testcase.name: Add element
testcase.system-out: Given I open the Add Remove Elements page...................................passed When I click the Add Element button.........................................passed Then I should see the Delete button.........................................passed

testcase.name: Select checkbox
testcase.system-out: Given I open the Checkboxes page............................................passed When I select the first checkbox............................................passed Then the first checkbox should be selected..................................passed

testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google search page........................................passed When I search for "GitHub"..................................................passed Then I should see "GitHub" in the results...................................passed
